title: elaeocarpus rutengii
intro: Elaeocarpus rutengii, also known as the Ruteng Tree, is a type of plant native to the island of Flores in Indonesia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus rutengii include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various infections, such as respiratory and urinary tract infections. Elaeocarpus rutengii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
